requirement_topic.en: BTRC Type Approval — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: BTRC型号核准——无线/电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: BTRC型號核准——無線/電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices with radio modules) must obtain a BTRC Type Approval Certificate before import or sale in Bangladesh. Applications are submitted to BTRC; test reports from overseas accredited laboratories accepted by BTRC are permitted. The approval is device-model-specific and must be renewed upon material change. No mutual recognition exists with CE, FCC, CCC, or SRRC.
summary.zh: 所有无线及电信终端设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及含无线模组的物联网设备）在进口或于孟加拉国销售前，须取得BTRC型号核准证书。申请提交至BTRC，接受BTRC认可的境外认可实验室出具的测试报告。核准针对具体设备型号，实质变更后须重新申请。与CE、FCC、CCC及SRRC不存在相互认可安排。
summary.zht: 所有無線及電信終端設備（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及含無線模組的物聯網裝置）在進口或於孟加拉國銷售前，須取得BTRC型號核准證書。申請提交至BTRC，接受BTRC認可的境外認可實驗室出具的測試報告。核准針對具體設備型號，實質變更後須重新申請。與CE、FCC、CCC及SRRC不存在相互認可安排。

standards_or_laws: BTRC Type Approval Guidelines for Terminal Equipment

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (issued by MIIT) for intentional radiators and a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment sold or connected to public networks in China. CCC certification under the GB 4943.1 safety and GB/T 9254 EMC scope covers certain products. These approvals are not recognised by BTRC and do not substitute Bangladesh type approval.
summary.zh: 中国对有意辐射体要求SRRC无线电型号核准（由工业和信息化部颁发），对在中国销售或接入公共网络的电信终端设备要求工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC认证覆盖GB 4943.1安全及GB/T 9254电磁兼容范围内的部分产品。上述核准不被BTRC承认，不可替代孟加拉国型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國對有意輻射體要求SRRC無線電型號核准（由工業和信息化部頒發），對在中國銷售或接入公共網絡的電信終端設備要求工業和信息化部網絡接入許可（NAL）。CCC認證涵蓋GB 4943.1安全及GB/T 9254電磁相容範圍內的部分產品。上述核准不被BTRC承認，不可替代孟加拉國型號核准。

standards_or_laws: China Radio Regulation (SRRC) — MIIT Order No. 23 (2020 revision)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Telecom Terminal Equipment

gap.en: Full gap: SRRC, CCC, FCC, and CE approvals are not recognised by BTRC. A standalone BTRC Type Approval Certificate, supported by test reports from BTRC-accepted overseas accredited laboratories, is mandatory for each device model before import into Bangladesh.
gap.zh: 完全差距：BTRC不承认SRRC、CCC、FCC及CE核准。每款设备型号在进口至孟加拉国前，须取得独立的BTRC型号核准证书，并附有BTRC认可的境外认可实验室出具的测试报告。
gap.zht: 完全差距：BTRC不承認SRRC、CCC、FCC及CE核准。每款設備型號在進口至孟加拉國前，須取得獨立的BTRC型號核准證書，並附有BTRC認可的境外認可實驗室出具的測試報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BTRC Type Approval is mandatory for all radio/telecom terminal equipment imported into Bangladesh. Chinese SRRC, CCC, or other foreign approvals do not satisfy this requirement. Engage a BTRC-registered local agent and submit test reports from an overseas accredited laboratory accepted by BTRC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BTRC型号核准对所有进口至孟加拉国的无线/电信终端设备均为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC或其他境外核准不满足此要求。建议委托BTRC注册的本地代理人，并提交BTRC认可的境外认可实验室出具的测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BTRC型號核准對所有進口至孟加拉國的無線/電信終端設備均為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC或其他境外核准不滿足此要求。建議委託BTRC註冊的本地代理人，並提交BTRC認可的境外認可實驗室出具的測試報告。
